ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "framework" TEXT /* Framework used for the model (e.g., TensorFlow, PyTorch) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the model was trained */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the model belongs to */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the model (e.g., in training, deployed, archived) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the model */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the model */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model for which metrics are recorded */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number during training */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy value for the epoch */,
  "loss" REAL /* Loss value for the epoch */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision value for the epoch */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall value for the epoch */,
  "f1_measure" REAL /* F1-measure value for the epoch */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used during training */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used during training */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the training epoch in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "validation_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model for which metrics are recorded */,
  "epoch" INTEGER /* Epoch number during validation */,
  "precision_micro" REAL /* Precision (micro) value for the epoch */,
  "recall_micro" REAL /* Recall (micro) value for the epoch */,
  "f1_micro" REAL /* F1-measure (micro) value for the epoch */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy value for the epoch */,
  "loss" REAL /* Loss value for the epoch */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used during validation */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used during validation */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the validation epoch in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_validation_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data scientist, ML engineer) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the project */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the project was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the model */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model associated with this version */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the model */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the version */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_versions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_deployments" (
  "deployment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each deployment entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model that was deployed */,
  "deployment_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was deployed */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment where the model is deployed (e.g., production, staging) */,
  "deployment_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who deployed the model */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the deployment (e.g., successful, failed) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the deployment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("deployment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_deployment_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("deployment_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_deployments_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the model being audited */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., trained, evaluated) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_audits_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)
